$schema_note: Zava demo Fabric/orchestration config. Copy to deploy_config.json (gitignored) and replace <PLACEHOLDER> tokens. NO secrets in this file: secrets are referenced by Key Vault name or acquired via `az login` at runtime. Validate with: python scripts/config_schema.py --validate fabric/config/deploy_config.sample.json databricks/config/databricks_config.sample.json

capacity._comment: Fresh-provision path (use_existing=false) is the default. To bring your own Fabric capacity, set use_existing=true and fill existing_capacity_id with a real ARM resource id.
capacity.name: zava-fabric-cap

workspace._comment: Fresh path creates the workspace + Workspace Identity (Step 10). Existing path attaches to existing_workspace_id. identity_object_id + workspace_id are placeholders until Workspace Identity is created in Step 10; 00_create_workspace.py --write-config persists the resolved workspace GUID into workspace_id and the identity object id into identity_object_id (consumed by the Step-28 ADLS hardening wave).
workspace.name: zava-fabric-ws
workspace._comment_step10: Fields below are read by fabric/scripts/00_create_workspace.py (Step 10). description: workspace description on create. capacity_ref: which Fabric capacity (by display name) to bind; defaults to capacity.name above. enable_workspace_identity: toggle Workspace Identity provisioning (default true). admin_object_id: optional deploy-SP object id to add as workspace Admin (placeholder; az ad sp show --id <app-id> --query id).

source._comment: databricks_catalog MUST equal the selected Databricks Asset Bundle target's catalog (databricks/bundle/databricks.yml). The default dev/prod targets both build 'zava'; scripts/deploy.py fails fast if they diverge (Step 28 catalog coherence).

mirroring._comment: Variation 1 — Mirrored Azure Databricks Catalog (read by 10_create_mirrored_catalog.py). databricks_connection_id is the one-time OAuth connection created manually in Step 11 (placeholder until created). schemas defaults to [gold_schema] when omitted.
mirroring.description: Mirrored Azure Databricks Unity Catalog (certified gold)

shortcut._comment: Variation 2 — secured OneLake shortcut (read by 20_create_shortcut.py). connection_id is the ADLS Gen2 shortcut connection (manual consent, Step 12). Provide the ADLS target as abfss_path OR adls_location + adls_subpath (discover via the runbook PATH DISCOVERY procedure).
shortcut.name: rentals_curated

lakehouse._comment: Fabric Lakehouse that hosts the shortcut + thin gold + Direct Lake model.
lakehouse.name: zava-lakehouse

report._comment: Power BI report deploy + rebind (read by 50_deploy_report.py).
report.name: Zava Fleet Dashboard

operations_agent._comment: Required when features.enable_operations_agent=true (optional Teams path; read by 80_create_operations_agent.py). message_recipient_upn / action_pipeline_* are placeholders.

alerting._comment: Required when features.enable_activator_email=true. Placeholder only — never commit a real address.
